text:
The Microsoft co-founder, 68, was spotted on July 29 watching gymnastics

Kevin Voigt/Getty

The2024 Paris Olympicshave already proven to be filled with A-list celebrities after just a few days of competition — and billionaireBill Gatesis one of them.

The Microsoft co-founder, 68, was spotted on Monday, July 29, attending artistic gymnastics events.

Other celebrities spotted at the Paris Olympics includeTom Cruise,Mick Jagger,Lady Gaga,Ariana Grande,Cynthia Erivo,John Legend,Pharrell WilliamsandCeline Dion.

Never miss a story — sign up forPEOPLE's free daily newsletterto stay up-to-date on the best of what PEOPLE has to offer, from celebrity news to compelling human interest stories.

He is also likely on hand to watch his son-in-law,Nayel Nassar,who is competing inequestrian events for Team Egypt.

In January, Gates celebratedNassar’s 33rd birthdayby posting a photo of the equestrian and wifeJennifer Gates— the eldest of Bill and Melinda French Gates' three children — with the couple's 1-year-old daughter Leila.

“Happy Birthday,@nayelnassar!” Gates wrote in his Instagram caption on Jan 21. “It has been so fun spending time with you and watching you become an incredible devoted dad to Leila.”

Nassar married Jennifer, 28, at a farm in Westchester County, N.Y., in October 2021.

Jennifer, who graduatedfrom Columbia University with a master's degree in public health in May 2023, is also an accomplished equestrian.

Nassar is a 2013 Stanford University graduate with a bachelor's degree in economics who also represented Egypt at the 2012 and 2020 Olympics.

Jennifer began dating Nassar in early 2017 andannounced their engagementin 2020 with a proposal photo taken during a ski trip.

Theywelcomed their daughter, Leila, in March 2023, making Bill a grandparent.

To learn more about all the Olympic and Paralympic hopefuls, come topeople.comto check out ongoing coverage before, during and after the games. And sign up forGoing for Gold, our Olympics newsletter, to get the biggest stories from the Games delivered straight to your inbox. Watch the Paris Olympics and Paralympics, beginning July 26, on NBC and Peacock.

title: Bill Gates Spotted at Paris Olympics Watching Gymnastics
description: Billionaire Bill Gates is one of many celebrities at the 2024 Summer Olympics in Paris watching artistic gymnastics. His daughter's husband, Nayel Nassar, is competing in equestrian events for Team Egypt.
